sources.name: Vogue Business AI
sources.query: site:vogue.com/business/technology/artificial-intelligence ("AI fashion" OR "AI beauty" OR "AI shopping" OR "agentic commerce" OR "virtual try-on")

sources.name: Business of Fashion AI
sources.query: site:businessoffashion.com/topics/technology/artificial-intelligence ("AI fashion" OR "AI beauty" OR "AI shopping" OR "agentic commerce" OR "virtual try-on")

sources.name: Glossy AI Fashion and Beauty
sources.query: site:glossy.co (fashion OR beauty OR luxury) (AI OR "artificial intelligence" OR "AI shopping" OR agentic OR "virtual try-on" OR "AI search")

sources.name: BeautyMatter AI
sources.query: site:beautymatter.com (beauty AND (AI OR "artificial intelligence" OR "AI shopping" OR "AI discovery" OR agentic OR recommendations))

sources.name: Retail TouchPoints AI Shopping
sources.query: site:retailtouchpoints.com ("AI shopping" OR "agentic commerce" OR "generative AI" OR OpenAI OR Shopify OR Google OR Meta OR Amazon) (retail OR ecommerce OR commerce OR shopping)

sources.name: Shopify Agentic Commerce
sources.query: site:shopify.com/news ("agentic commerce" OR "AI commerce" OR "Agentic Storefronts" OR "Shopify Catalog" OR "AI shopping" OR OpenAI OR Google)

sources.name: OpenAI Commerce
sources.query: site:openai.com (shopping OR commerce OR "agentic commerce" OR "Instant Checkout" OR "Agentic Commerce Protocol" OR merchants)

sources.name: Google Shopping AI
sources.query: site:blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/shopping ("AI shopping" OR "AI Mode" OR "virtual try-on" OR "agentic checkout" OR "Universal Commerce Protocol" OR Gemini)

sources.name: Brand Watchlist AI Agents
sources.query: (Nike OR "Ralph Lauren" OR Sephora OR Ulta OR LVMH OR Kering OR Zara OR "H&M" OR Revolve OR Walmart OR Target OR Amazon) ("AI agent" OR "AI assistant" OR "AI stylist" OR "AI shopping" OR "virtual try-on" OR "product discovery" OR "agentic commerce")

sources.name: AI Fashion and Beauty Market Scan
sources.query: ("AI fashion" OR "AI beauty" OR "AI stylist" OR "virtual try-on" OR "AI recommendations") (fashion OR beauty OR retail OR shopping OR luxury)

sources.name: Agentic Commerce Market Scan
sources.query: ("agentic commerce" OR "AI shopping" OR "AI product discovery" OR "instant checkout" OR "commerce protocol") (retail OR ecommerce OR shopping OR Shopify OR OpenAI OR Google)

sources.name: Platform AI Shopping Market Scan
sources.query: (OpenAI OR Shopify OR Google OR Meta OR Amazon OR Walmart) ("AI shopping" OR "AI search for shopping" OR "AI agent" OR "AI assistant" OR "product discovery" OR "virtual try-on")
